# Power Apps Code Apps - Copilot Instructions

You are helping build Power Apps code apps: React/Vite/TypeScript single-page applications hosted inside Power Platform.

---

## Non-negotiable rules

- All connector and service calls go in `src/hooks/`. Never call services directly in components or pages.
- User identity always comes from `getContext()` via `useCurrentUser`. Never hardcode names or emails.
- Never edit files under `src/generated/`. They are regenerated by `pac code add-data-source`.
- Never run `pac code push` without explicit user confirmation in the current message.
- Always run `npm run build` and confirm it passes before deploying.
- The `pac` CLI is a Windows executable. Always run it via PowerShell: `pwsh -NoProfile -Command "pac ..."`. Never run pac in bash.
- Check `.github/instructions/known-issues.md` before running any `pac code` command.

---

## Project structure

```
src/
  hooks/        <- all connector/service calls
  pages/        <- one file per screen
  components/   <- shared UI pieces
  services/     <- mock service layer
  generated/    <- auto-generated, never edit
  types/        <- shared TypeScript interfaces
```

---

## SDK imports

Always use subpath imports. Never import from the root package:

```typescript
import { getContext } from '@microsoft/power-apps/app';
import { trackEvent } from '@microsoft/power-apps/telemetry';
```

---

## Memory bank

If `memory-bank.md` exists in the project root, read it first and skip steps already marked complete. Update it after every significant step.

---

For full development standards see `.github/instructions/development-standards.md`.
For known bugs and fixes see `.github/instructions/known-issues.md`.
